sql_array: CREATE TABLE xml_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, doc XMLType, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO xml_data (id, doc) VALUES (2, XMLType('<root><child></child></root>'));
INSERT INTO xml_data (id, doc) VALUES (3, XMLType('<root><bad>Data</bad></root>'));
SELECT id, doc.isSchemaValid('file://xmlschema/test0001/clean.xsd') >= 1 AS valid FROM xml_data;
SELECT id, doc.isSchemaValid('file://xmlschema/test0001/clean.xsd') AS is_valid FROM xml_data WHERE is_valid >= 1;
SELECT id, doc, CASE WHEN doc.isSchemaValid('file://xmlschema/test0001/clean.xsd') >= 1 THEN 'Valid' ELSE 'Invalid' END AS schema_status FROM xml_data;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS valid_count FROM (SELECT id, doc.isSchemaValid('file://xmlschema/test0001/clean.xsd') AS is_valid FROM xml_data) AS inner_query WHERE is_valid >= 1;
SELECT id FROM xml_data WHERE doc.isSchemaValid(CASE WHEN id >= 2 THEN 'file://xmlschema/test0001/clean.xsd' ELSE NULL END) = 0;
SELECT doc FROM xml_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM xml_data WHERE doc.isSchemaValid('file://xmlschema/test0001/clean.xsd') < 1) GROUP BY doc HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1;
